summary: Foundation, design system, app shell, auth and the centerpiece Inbox UI are in place, verified (Pint + Larastan L6 + Pest + tsc all green) and runnable locally. Live integrations (WhatsApp/store/realtime) and the SiteGround staging deploy are blocked on credentials — see BLOCKERS.md.

goals.desc: Init Laravel 12 (pinned), Pint, Larastan L6, Pest, Telescope(dev pending).
Inertia+React+TS+Tailwind v4, Fortify+Sanctum installed, spatie/permission, db queue, memcached-ready, S3/Pusher via env.
Workspace tenancy core: BelongsToWorkspace trait + global scope + SetCurrentWorkspace middleware + Tenancy holder; cross-tenant isolation test green.
Design tokens, light/dark, RTL scaffolding, health endpoint (/up).
CI pipeline: composer, pint, larastan, tsc, vite build, pest, artifact.
SiteGround staging deploy + Pusher/S3 round-trips. Needs hosting + service credentials (BLOCKERS.md).
Workspace/User models + migrations; spatie roles installed; demo seeder.
Register + Login + workspace creation done with non-enumerating errors. Forgot/reset, email verification, 2FA, lockout cooldown: pending.
Onboarding wizard (skippable, resumable, setup checklist).
Full RBAC policies/gates; no dead controls.
Component library: Button, Input, Card, Badge, Avatar, Toast, Modal/Confirm, Tooltip, States. More primitives (Table, Tabs, Combobox, DatePicker, Uploader) pending.
Universal patterns: skeleton, 3 empties, error state, toast/undo, scale-aware confirm. Offline banner + queued-write mechanism pending.
App shell: nav rail, top bar, ⌘K command palette, wallet chip, theme toggle, RTL-aware logical properties.
3-pane layout + conversation list + saved filters + search (UI; virtualization + server data pending).
Thread view: day-less grouping, delivery ticks, bot/human/system distinction (UI).
Composer state machine: free/template/resolved + optimistic send. Bot-controlled/offline states pending wiring.
Customer context pane: identity, tags, orders, products, notes (UI).
Realtime Pusher delivery, presence/collision, offline queue + resume.
Contact model (tenant-scoped) created; full CRM pending.
Dashboard overview (UI with seeded metrics).
